info.name: Atlassian rest/api/3/app/
info.description:
Needs description.

Contact Support:
 Email: ecosystem@atlassian.com

query.description: Whether to generate a changelog for this update.

request.description:
Updates the value of one or more custom fields on one or more issues. Combinations of custom field and issue should be unique within the request.

Apps can only perform this operation on [custom fields](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/manifest-reference/modules/jira-custom-field/) and [custom field types](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/manifest-reference/modules/jira-custom-field-type/) declared in their own manifests.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** Only the app that owns the custom field or custom field type can update its values with this operation.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: Whether to generate a changelog for this update.

response.name: Returned if the request is invalid.

query.description: Whether to generate a changelog for this update.

response.name: Returned if the request is not authenticated as the app that provided all the fields.

query.description: Whether to generate a changelog for this update.

response.name: Returned if any field is not found.

query.description: Whether to generate a changelog for this update.

The list of configuration IDs. To include multiple configurations, separate IDs with an ampersand: `id=10000&id=10001`. Can't be provided with `fieldContextId`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.

The list of configuration IDs. To include multiple configurations, separate IDs with an ampersand: `id=10000&id=10001`. Can't be provided with `fieldContextId`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.

The list of field context IDs. To include multiple field contexts, separate IDs with an ampersand: `fieldContextId=10000&fieldContextId=10001`. Can't be provided with `id`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.

The list of field context IDs. To include multiple field contexts, separate IDs with an ampersand: `fieldContextId=10000&fieldContextId=10001`. Can't be provided with `id`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.
The ID of the issue to filter results by. If the issue doesn't exist, an empty list is returned. Can't be provided with `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.
The ID or key of the project to filter results by. Must be provided with `issueTypeId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The ID of the issue type to filter results by. Must be provided with `projectKeyOrId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

variable.description: (Required) The ID or key of the custom field, for example `customfield_10000`.

request.description:
Returns a [paginated](#pagination) list of configurations for a custom field of a [type](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/manifest-reference/modules/jira-custom-field-type/) created by a [Forge app](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/).

The result can be filtered by one of these criteria:

* `id`.
* `fieldContextId`.
* `issueId`.
* `projectKeyOrId` and `issueTypeId`.

Otherwise, all configurations are returned.

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg). Jira permissions are not required for the Forge app that provided the custom field type.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.

query.description: The list of configuration IDs. To include multiple configurations, separate IDs with an ampersand: `id=10000&id=10001`. Can't be provided with `fieldContextId`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.

The list of field context IDs. To include multiple field contexts, separate IDs with an ampersand: `fieldContextId=10000&fieldContextId=10001`. Can't be provided with `id`, `issueId`, `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.
The ID of the issue to filter results by. If the issue doesn't exist, an empty list is returned. Can't be provided with `projectKeyOrId`, or `issueTypeId`.
The ID or key of the project to filter results by. Must be provided with `issueTypeId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The ID of the issue type to filter results by. Must be provided with `projectKeyOrId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).
The maximum number of items to return per page.

response.name: Returned if the request is invalid.

The ID or key of the project to filter results by. Must be provided with `issueTypeId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The ID of the issue type to filter results by. Must be provided with `projectKeyOrId`. Can't be provided with `issueId`.
The index of the first item to return in a page of results (page offset).

response.name: Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.

variable.description: (Required) The ID or key of the custom field, for example `customfield_10000`.

request.description:
Update the configuration for contexts of a custom field of a [type](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/manifest-reference/modules/jira-custom-field-type/) created by a [Forge app](https://developer.atlassian.com/platform/forge/).

**[Permissions](#permissions) required:** *Administer Jira* [global permission](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/x4dKLg). Jira permissions are not required for the Forge app that created the custom field type.

response.name: Returned if the request is successful.
Returned if the request is invalid.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing.
Returned if the user is not a Jira admin or the request is not authenticated as from the app that provided the field.
Returned if the custom field is not found.
